test.command: pnpm --dir "/Users/aischool/work/papierklammer_droid" exec vitest run ui/src/ packages/orchestrator-tui/ --max-workers=3

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Scope gui-worker validation commands to the touched surface area so GUI-only features can require UI tests + typecheck without requiring orchestrator-tui tests.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review report gui-dashboard-fixes notes gui-worker currently mandates `pnpm exec vitest run packages/orchestrator-tui/ --max-workers=3` even though the feature and contract are GUI-only.
